items.briefing:
Australian organisations are facing heightened cyber risk right now due to two overlapping pressures. The end of financial year period has created rushed workflows and distracted staff, making businesses more vulnerable to phishing and fraud. At the same time, Amazon Prime Day sales events are prompting a surge in scams targeting Australian shoppers, with authorities warning people to be cautious about deals that seem too good to be true.

If you're shopping online or processing invoices under time pressure this week, slow down and double-check before clicking links or making payments — verify any unexpected deals or requests through official channels directly.

featured.title: Aussies Face Reduced Cybercrime Risk, as Pressure Shifts to SMBs
featured.quote: Australian SMBs now bear primary cybersecurity burden as institutional defenses strengthen.
